expected_behavior: A canonical PolicyDecision records allow/deny/escalate, reason codes, safe resolution guidance, policy path, bundle revision/hash, decision_id, input digest, timestamps, tenant/namespace, and evidence/audit refs.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: PolicyDecision JSON fixtures, OPA decision_id/revision, audit linkage, redaction proof.
then: A canonical PolicyDecision records allow/deny/escalate, reason codes, safe resolution guidance, policy path, bundle revision/hash, decision_id, input digest, timestamps, tenant/namespace, and evidence/audit refs.
verification_method: Schema contract tests and golden JSON tests for allow, deny, escalate, undefined, and error results.
when: OPA and the CornerStone policy adapter return a result.
